case_title: CHI KONG CHEUNG VS. DIANA WAJMEN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY RESPONDENT WAJMEN, DIANA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
